screen.itemglint.quick_config.title: Item Outline Quick Config
screen.itemglint.quick_config.general_hi: This screen now focuses only on the held-item outline. Save to write the current layout to the client config.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.hand_hint: Keep at least one hand enabled, otherwise the outline will have nothing to render.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.shape_hint: Width and softness control the edge profile. Larger values make the outline thicker and smoother.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.alpha_hint: Lower alpha thresholds catch more translucent pixels; opacity controls the final strength of the outline itself.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.effects.bl: Bloom settings only affect the halo around the outline. When bloom is disabled, these controls are dimmed.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.effects.mo: Scroll, glow, and pulse adjust movement and intensity. Reduce them for a cleaner, more static look.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.colors_hin: Pick a target color, then adjust it with the picker, brightness bar, RGB sliders, or a hex value. Secondary color is mainly used by dual-color modes.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.en: Master switch for the held-item outline effect.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.ma: Shows the outline on the item rendered in the main hand.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.of: Shows the outline on the item rendered in the off hand.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.bl: Enables the extra halo pass around the outline. Disable it for a cleaner edge-only look.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.co: Chooses between a single color, scrolling dual colors, or a rainbow flow animation.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.wi: Controls how far the outline expands away from the held item silhouette.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.so: Controls the feathering of the outline edge. Higher values create a softer outer falloff.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.al: Sets the minimum source alpha needed to count as part of the held-item mask. Higher values trim translucent pixels more aggressively.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.op: Scales the final outline visibility after all other effects are applied.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.bl: Changes the internal resolution used for bloom. Lower resolutions are blurrier and cheaper.
Controls how bright and visible the bloom halo becomes.
Controls how far the bloom spreads outward from the outline.
Sets the maximum blur pass count used to build wide bloom radii.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.co: Controls how fast scrolling or rainbow color modes animate.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.de: Boosts outline intensity around strong depth transitions, making the edge read more clearly against the scene.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.gl: Adds extra intensity to the outline rim and bloom halo.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.pu: Controls how fast the outline pulse animation cycles.
Controls how much the pulse animation changes width and brightness.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.ac: Selects whether the color tools edit the primary or secondary outline color.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.co: Drag inside the picker to change hue and saturation.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.br: Drag to adjust the brightness/value of the active color.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.he: Type a hex color such as #3AF2FF for the active color.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.re: Adjusts the red channel of the active color.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.gr: Adjusts the green channel of the active color.
screen.itemglint.quick_config.tooltip.bl: Adjusts the blue channel of the active color.
